compiled_state.title: Platform compat RED tests: special-char round-trips + flock detection
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Write RED tests in `tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh` that verify:
1. Shell-special-character round-trips (quotes, backslashes, embedded newlines, unicode) through ticket_show, ticket_comment, ticket_create, ticket_tag, ticket_edit, ticket_list, ticket_transition
2. `_ticketlib_has_flock` detection helper is set correctly (=1 when flock available, =0 when absent)
3. When `_ticketlib_has_flock=0` is forced, write ops fall back to python3 fcntl.flock path and produce identical output

All tests must FAIL before ticket-lib-api.sh implements `_ticketlib_has_flock` and the fallback logic (RED phase).

## Testing Mode

RED — tests verify new behavior that does not exist yet.

## File Impact

- tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add mapping entries)

## Acceptance

- `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh` exits non-zero (RED) before implementation
- Test file is executable (`chmod +x`)
- Tests cover all 3 DD criteria (round-trips, flock detection, flock fallback)

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh` exits non-zero (RED) before implementation
- [ ] Test file is executable (`chmod +x`)
- [ ] Tests cover all 3 DD criteria (round-trips, flock detection, flock fallback)
- [ ] Tests cover shell-special-char round-trips for: quotes, backslashes, embedded newlines, unicode
- [ ] Tests verify `_ticketlib_has_flock` is set =1 when flock available, =0 when absent
- [ ] Tests verify fallback to python3 fcntl.flock when `_ticketlib_has_flock=0` forced
comments.author: Worktree
